extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won Stage 9 ITT, gaining 3+ minutes on Yates who collapsed after initial strength, while Nibali excelled mid-course.
tactical_patterns: Nibali gained 20 seconds on Yates specifically on middle flat section between time checks, defying ITT specialist expectations.
Roglic paced for wet finale perfectly while Campenaerts' early dry conditions yielded 20-30 second advantage despite mechanical.
Yates started fastest at 11.7km mark but imploded on climb, losing 3+ minutes despite being 17s behind Roglic early.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: won despite starting in rain while early starters had dry roads, showing superior pacing/climbing TT power
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: catastrophic collapse after strong 11.7km split, losing 3+ minutes and falling from GC contention on climb
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: unexpectedly strong middle section gained 20s on Yates between time checks, best among GC riders there
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: neutral: mechanical cost 20-30s and likely stage win, but dry early conditions gave significant advantage over late starters
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: positive: took Maglia Rosa from breakaway credit, mature performance holding position despite not being GC threat
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: only 11s behind Roglic at first time check, showing TT strength but couldn't sustain on climb
